reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, poco personal, sin tarjetas, sin serviclub. A pesar de ser una estación ACA deja mucho que desear.👎👎👎👎

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, understaffed, no credit cards, no Serviclub. Despite being an ACA station, it leaves much to be desired. 👎👎👎👎

reviews.comment:
Pasando por aquí no podes dejar de probar los sándwiches caseros de jamón crudo y queso.

La atención es buena. Un poco desorganizado pero propio de la zona, nada fuera de lo esperado.

(Translated by Google)
While you're here, you absolutely must try the homemade prosciutto and cheese sandwiches.

The service is good. A little disorganized, but that's typical for the area, nothing out of the ordinary.
